meta.title: Spektors · Client area
meta.description: Web banking and chat with a local LLM

error.title: Could not load this page
error.hint: Stop anything else using port 3000, delete apps/web-client/.next, then restart the dev server. If it keeps failing, check the browser console (F12) and the details below.

home.title: Chat
home.tagline: Messages and replies are stored on the server.
home.apiResolvedLabel: Current API base URL in this browser:
home.intro: The public API uses the header <codeAppId>X-App-Id: web_client</codeAppId>. The <codeApiUrl>NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL</codeApiUrl> variable is the backend base URL (default localhost:8000).

chat.empty: Type a message — the reply is stored in PostgreSQL.
